name: Beef with Assorted Vegetables - Szechuan
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a cleaver to slice beef across the grain at an angle into thin strips; cut strips 2 inches long.
2. Combine marinade in a medium bowl; add beef strips and mix well, letting stand for 30 minutes.
3. Mix seasoning sauce in a small bowl; mix well; set aside.
4. Add salt and carrot to water in a small saucepan; bring to boil, then add snow peas or green beans; cook for 1 minute.
5. Remove from heat and cool vegetables in cold water; drain well.
6. Slice carrot into thin slices.
7. Heat oil in wok over medium heat for 1 minute; add marinated beef and stir-fry until lightly browned, removing with a slotted spoon and draining over the wok.
8. Remove oil from wok except for 1/4 cup; heat over high heat for 30 seconds; add red peppers and stir-fry for 15 seconds.
9. Add mushrooms and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
10. Add seasoning sauce, cooked snow peas, carrots, and cooked beef; stir-fry until the sauce thickens slightly. Serve hot.
